description: Use this API to save PSSE dynamics working memory into a Snapshot file. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = snap(status, sfile)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of five elements specifying save options. For each entry, -1 may be specified to indicate that the number of elements of the corresponding array(s) to save in the Snapshot File is 1 through the next available - 1. (input).

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Snapshot file; ‘*’ to use the most recently accessed snapshot file in the current execution of psse. (input; no default allowed).

status.description: number of CONs to save (next available-1 by default).
number of STATEs to save (next available-1 by default).
number of VARs to save (next available-1 by default).
number of ICONs to save (next available-1 by default).
number of channels to save (next available-1 by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
